assert.//: ADVISORY (warn) until Lighthouse runs against a real Vercel preview (CDN + real images). LHCI on a cold local `next start` with cloudinary=demo + 4x CPU throttle under-scores vs production, so these do NOT block PRs. The BLOCKING per-PR gate is bundle-guard (<=150 KB gz) + image-lint. Targets kept as the numbers to hit. SEO is expectedly low on /checkout (noindex — M05-P09).

bundle.defaultJustification: CLAUDE.md convention #7 — customer routes ≤150 KB gz first-load JS on Fast-3G/360px devices.
bundle.reductionNote: 2026-07: code-split @vergeo/auth (the Supabase browser client) off first-load via a lazy getBrowserClient accessor — useSession and every direct consumer now import it dynamically. Dropped ~60 KB gz from each customer route (PDP 195→131, auth/checkout/account routes 184–192→120–128), bringing ALL 47 routes under the 150 KB target, so the per-route overrides (previously up to 197 KB) are gone and the default 150 now genuinely gates every route.

lighthouse.justification: Zambia 3G guardrail from docs/plan/00-discovery.md — RTT 150ms, 1.6 Mbps downlink, 4× CPU slowdown.
